creator: matusita@ics.es.osaka-u.ac.jp
text:
asami>  * Hmm... I'm also the author of the patch, and the administrator of
asami>  * ftp.ics.es.osaka-u.ac.jp, so I don't mind about that 'somebody try to
asami>  * get *nonexistent* contents', but I doubt anybody think so too...

asami> What are you trying to say here?

Some admins of anonymous ftp sites may think 'Hmm, why lots of clients
try to get files which DOES NOT EXIST in that directory'. It may
causes confusing, or he/she may be irritated to such a accesses.

***

I just put 'jp-fvwm-2.0.45-97030301.tar.gz' to incoming
directory of ftp.freebsd.org. I think it's simple and smart Makefile.

-- -
Makoto `MAR_kun' MATSUSHITA
